containerOverrides.name: tailrd-backend
command: set -eu; cd /app; npm install --no-save --silent @aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager@3.1032.0 >/tmp/npm.log 2>&1 || (cat /tmp/npm.log; exit 1); node -e "const{S3Client,GetObjectCommand}=require('@aws-sdk/client-s3');const fs=require('fs');(async()=>{const c=new S3Client({region:'us-east-1'});const r=await c.send(new GetObjectCommand({Bucket:'tailrd-cardiovascular-datasets-863518424332',Key:'migration-artifacts/phase-2d/runPrismaMigrateRehearsal.sh'}));fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/m.sh',await r.Body.transformToString());fs.chmodSync('/tmp/m.sh',0o755)})().catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)})"; sh /tmp/m.sh
